# senegal-raid-reservation
Fiche de réservation quad Sénégal Raid Évasion
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Réservation — Sénégal Raid Évasion</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tabler/icons-webfont@2.44.0/tabler-icons.min.css">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    body {
      font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
      background: #f5f0eb;
      min-height: 100vh;
      padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
      color: #1a0e05;
    }

    .re-root {
      max-width: 660px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }

    /* ─── HERO ─── */
    .re-hero {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #D85A30 0%, #BA7517 100%);
      border-radius: 16px;
      padding: 1.5rem 1.75rem 1.25rem;
      color: #fff;
      margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 1.1rem;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(216,90,48,0.25);
    }
    .re-hero-logo {
      width: 70px; height: 70px;
      border-radius: 14px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      flex-shrink: 0; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .re-hero h1 {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 28px; letter-spacing: 1.5px;
      margin: 0 0 2px; color: #fff; font-weight: 400;
    }
    .re-hero p { margin: 0; font-size: 12.5px; opacity: 0.88; }
    .re-badge {
      display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.22); color: #fff;
      border-radius: 6px; padding: 2px 9px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-top: 6px;
    }

    /* ─── SECTIONS ─── */
    .re-section {
      background: #fff;
      border: 1px solid #e8ddd3;
      border-radius: 14px;
      padding: 1.1rem 1.25rem;
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
      box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
    }
    .re-section-title {
      font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px;
      color: #8a6a50; text-transform: uppercase;
      margin: 0 0 13px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #f0e8e0; padding-bottom: 9px;
    }
    .re-section-title i { font-size: 15px; color: #D85A30; }

    /* ─── FIELDS ─── */
    .re-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; }
    .re-grid.three { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; }
    .re-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
    .re-field label { font-size: 12px; color: #7a5c40; font-weight: 700; }
    .re-field input, .re-field select, .re-field textarea {
      font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
      border: 1.5px solid #e2d5c8;
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 9px 12px;
      font-size: 13.5px;
      color: #1a0e05;
      background: #faf7f4;
      outline: none;
      transition: border-color 0.18s;
    }
    .re-field input:focus, .re-field select:focus, .re-field textarea:focus {
      border-color: #D85A30;
    }
    .re-field textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 60px; }
    .re-full { grid-column: 1 / -1; }

    /* ─── OFFRES / CIRCUITS ─── */
    .circuit-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
    .circuit-item {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
      border: 1.5px solid #e2d5c8;
      border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 11px 14px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
      background: #faf7f4;
    }
    .circuit-item:hover { border-color: #D85A30; background: #fff5f1; }
    .circuit-item.selected { border-color: #D85A30; background: #fff5f1; }
    .circuit-item input[type=radio] { accent-color: #D85A30; width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .circuit-meta { flex: 1; }
    .circuit-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 13.5px; color: #1a0e05; }
    .circuit-info { font-size: 11.5px; color: #7a5c40; margin-top: 2px; }
    .circuit-price { font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; color: #D85A30; white-space: nowrap; }

    /* ─── PAIEMENT ─── */
    .pay-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; }
    .pay-card {
      border: 2px solid #e2d5c8;
      border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 16px 12px;
      cursor: pointer; text-align: center;
      transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      background: #faf7f4;
    }
    .pay-card:hover { border-color: #aaa; }
    .pay-card.wave.selected { border-color: #00baf2; background: #e6f7ff; }
    .pay-card.orange.selected { border-color: #ff6600; background: #fff4ec; }
    .pay-logo { width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
    .pay-logo.wave-logo { background: #00baf2; }
    .pay-logo.orange-logo { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #eee; }
    .pay-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; }
    .pay-name.wave { color: #0088bb; }
    .pay-name.orange { color: #ff6600; }
    .pay-sub { font-size: 11px; color: #8a6a50; }
    .pay-number { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a0e05; }

    /* Wave SVG penguin */
    .wave-penguin { width: 38px; height: 38px; }
    /* Orange Money SVG */
    .orange-logo-svg { width: 42px; height: 28px; }

    .pay-link-box {
      margin-top: 12px; padding: 10px 14px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      background: #f5f0eb;
      font-size: 13px; color: #7a5c40;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      border: 1px solid #e2d5c8;
    }
    .pay-link-box a { color: #185FA5; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; }
    .pay-link-box a.orange-link { color: #ff6600; }

    /* ─── TOTAL ─── */
    .re-total {
      background: #fff5f1;
      border: 1.5px solid #f0cfc0;
      border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 13px 16px;
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
      margin-top: 8px;
    }
    .re-total .label { font-size: 13px; color: #8a6a50; font-weight: 600; }
    .re-total .amount { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: #D85A30; font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; letter-spacing: 1px; }
    .total-note { font-size: 11px; color: #b08060; margin-top: 4px; }

    /* ─── BUTTON ─── */
    .btn-pay {
      width: 100%; padding: 15px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #25D366, #128C7E);
      color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 10px;
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 18px; letter-spacing: 1.5px;
      cursor: pointer; margin-top: 10px;
      transition: opacity 0.15s;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px;
    }
    .btn-pay:hover { opacity: 0.92; }
    .btn-pay svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; }

    /* ─── SHARE LINK ─── */
    .share-section {
      background: #fff;
      border: 1px solid #e8ddd3;
      border-radius: 14px;
      padding: 1.1rem 1.25rem;
      margin-top: 1rem;
    }
    .share-title { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px; color: #8a6a50; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
    .share-title i { font-size: 15px; color: #D85A30; }
    .link-box { display: flex; gap: 8px; }
    .link-input { flex: 1; font-family: monospace; font-size: 12px; background: #f5f0eb; border: 1.5px solid #e2d5c8; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 12px; color: #5a3010; outline: none; }
    .copy-btn { background: #D85A30; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 16px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.15s; }
    .copy-btn:hover { background: #BA7517; }
    .share-networks { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .net-btn { flex: 1; min-width: 100px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1.5px solid #e2d5c8; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; color: #1a0e05; background: #faf7f4; transition: all 0.15s; }
    .net-btn:hover { border-color: #D85A30; background: #fff5f1; }

    /* ─── SUCCESS ─── */
    .success-box {
      display: none;
      background: #EAF3DE; border: 1.5px solid #639922;
      border-radius: 14px; padding: 1.5rem;
      text-align: center; margin-top: 1rem;
    }
    .success-box h3 { color: #3B6D11; margin: 10px 0 6px; font-size: 17px; }
    .success-box p { color: #27500A; font-size: 13px; }

    /* ─── FOOTER ─── */
    .re-footer {
      text-align: center; font-size: 12px; color: #8a6a50;
      margin-top: 16px; line-height: 1.8;
    }
    .re-footer a { color: #D85A30; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 700; }

    /* ─── RESPONSIVE ─── */
    @media (max-width: 500px) {
      .re-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .re-grid.three { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
      .pay-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="re-root">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <div class="re-hero">
    <div class="re-hero-logo" style="background:#fff; padding:3px; width:80px; height:80px; border-radius:14px;"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:74px;height:74px;object-fit:contain;" alt="Sénégal Raid Évasion"></div>
    <div>
      <h1>Sénégal Raid Évasion</h1>
      <p>Quad · Pirogue · Cheval · Dromadaire · Excursions</p>
      <span class="re-badge">
        <i class="ti ti-map-pin" style="font-size:11px; vertical-align:-1px;"></i>
        Lac Rose, Dakar, Sénégal
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- INFOS CLIENT -->
  <div class="re-section">
    <p class="re-section-title"><i class="ti ti-user" aria-hidden="true"></i> Informations du client</p>
    <div class="re-grid">
      <div class="re-field"><label>Prénom</label><input type="text" placeholder="ex: Moussa" id="prenom"></div>
      <div class="re-field"><label>Nom</label><input type="text" placeholder="ex: Diallo" id="nom"></div>
      <div class="re-field"><label>Téléphone / WhatsApp</label><input type="tel" placeholder="+221 7X XXX XX XX" id="tel"></div>
      <div class="re-field"><label>Email</label><input type="email" placeholder="email@exemple.com" id="email"></div>
      <div class="re-field re-full"><label>Nombre de personnes</label>
        <select id="nbpers" onchange="calcTotal()">
          <option value="1">1 personne</option>
          <option value="2">2 personnes</option>
          <option value="3">3 personnes</option>
          <option value="4">4 personnes</option>
          <option value="5">5+ personnes (groupe)</option>
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- DATE -->
  <div class="re-section">
    <p class="re-section-title"><i class="ti ti-calendar" aria-hidden="true"></i> Date &amp; heure</p>
    <div class="re-grid">
      <div class="re-field"><label>Date souhaitée</label><input type="date" id="datestart"></div>
      <div class="re-field"><label>Heure de départ</label>
        <select id="heure">
          <option>08h00</option><option>09h00</option><option>10h00</option>
          <option>11h00</option><option>14h00</option><option>15h00</option>
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- OFFRES -->
  <div class="re-section">
    <p class="re-section-title"><i class="ti ti-map-2" aria-hidden="true"></i> Choisissez votre offre</p>
    <div class="circuit-list">

      <!-- Tour du Lac SOLO -->
      <div class="circuit-item selected" onclick="selectCircuit(this, 20000, 'Tour du Lac — Solo Sensation')">
        <input type="radio" name="circuit" checked>
        <div class="circuit-meta">
          <div class="circuit-name">🏍 Tour du Lac — Solo Sensation</div>
          <div class="circuit-info">📍 Lac Rose · 1 personne · Pirogue 15 min + Quad 45 min + Cheval/Dromadaire 15-20 min</div>
        </div>
        <div class="circuit-price">20 000 FCFA</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Tour du Lac DUO -->
      <div class="circuit-item" onclick="selectCircuit(this, 25000, 'Tour du Lac — Duo Évasion')">
        <input type="radio" name="circuit">
        <div class="circuit-meta">
          <div class="circuit-name">👫 Tour du Lac — Duo Évasion</div>
          <div class="circuit-info">📍 Lac Rose · 2 personnes · Pirogue 15 min + Quad 45 min + Cheval/Dromadaire 15-20 min</div>
        </div>
        <div class="circuit-price">25 000 FCFA</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Kayar -->
      <div class="circuit-item" onclick="selectCircuit(this, 65000, 'Excursion Lac Rose → Kayar')">
        <input type="radio" name="circuit">
        <div class="circuit-meta">
          <div class="circuit-name">🌊 Excursion Lac Rose → Kayar</div>
          <div class="circuit-info">📍 Village de pêcheurs · Balade Quad 3H · Brunch offert · Plages pittoresques</div>
        </div>
        <div class="circuit-price">65 000 FCFA/pers</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Lompoul -->
      <div class="circuit-item" onclick="selectCircuit(this, 185000, 'Excursion Lompoul — 24H')">
        <input type="radio" name="circuit">
        <div class="circuit-meta">
          <div class="circuit-name">🏜 Excursion Lompoul — 24H</div>
          <div class="circuit-info">📍 Désert de Lompoul · Transport Quad A/R + Brunch · 1 nuitée · Hébergement + Restauration</div>
        </div>
        <div class="circuit-price">185 000 FCFA/pers</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Saint-Louis -->
      <div class="circuit-item" onclick="selectCircuit(this, 255000, 'Excursion Saint-Louis — 48H')">
        <input type="radio" name="circuit">
        <div class="circuit-meta">
          <div class="circuit-name">🏛 Excursion Saint-Louis — 48H</div>
          <div class="circuit-info">📍 Saint-Louis · Transport Quad A/R · 2 nuitées · Pension complète · Parc Djoudj UNESCO (en option)</div>
        </div>
        <div class="circuit-price">255 000 FCFA/pers</div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PAIEMENT -->
  <div class="re-section">
    <p class="re-section-title"><i class="ti ti-credit-card" aria-hidden="true"></i> Mode de paiement</p>
    <div class="pay-grid">

      <!-- Wave -->
      <div class="pay-card wave selected" onclick="selectPay(this,'wave')">
        <div class="pay-logo wave-logo" style="background:none;border:none;"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:60px;height:60px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;" alt="Wave"></div>
        <div class="pay-name wave">Wave</div>
        <div class="pay-number">+221 78 487 61 61</div>
        <div class="pay-sub">Paiement mobile rapide</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Orange Money -->
      <div class="pay-card orange" onclick="selectPay(this,'orange')">
        <div class="pay-logo orange-logo" style="background:none;border:none;"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:60px;height:60px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;" alt="Orange Money"></div>
        <div class="pay-name orange">Orange Money</div>
        <div class="pay-number">+221 78 487 61 61</div>
        <div class="pay-sub">Paiement mobile Orange</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="pay-link-box" id="pay-link-box">
      <i class="ti ti-link" style="font-size:16px; color:#D85A30;" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      <span id="pay-link-text">
        Lien Wave : <a href="https://wave.com/send?phone=221784876161" target="_blank">Payer via Wave ↗</a>
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- REMARQUES -->
  <div class="re-section">
    <p class="re-section-title"><i class="ti ti-notes" aria-hidden="true"></i> Remarques / Demandes spéciales</p>
    <div class="re-field">
      <textarea placeholder="Expérience quad, allergie, demande particulière, heure préférentielle..." id="notes"></textarea>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- TOTAL -->
  <div class="re-total">
    <div>
      <div class="label">Total estimé</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px; color:#8a6a50;" id="recap">Tour du Lac Solo × 1 pers</div>
    </div>
    <div class="amount" id="total">20 000 FCFA</div>
  </div>
  <div class="total-note" style="text-align:right; padding-right:4px;">
    Paiement confirmé après contact de notre équipe
  </div>

  <!-- BOUTON WHATSAPP -->
  <button class="btn-pay" onclick="submitReservation()">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#fff" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347z"/>
      <path d="M12 0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12c0 2.127.558 4.126 1.534 5.86L.057 23.269a.5.5 0 0 0 .611.637l5.647-1.479A11.945 11.945 0 0 0 12 24c6.627 0 12-5.373 12-12S18.627 0 12 0zm0 22a9.944 9.944 0 0 1-5.073-1.383l-.363-.216-3.764.986.997-3.672-.236-.376A9.944 9.944 0 0 1 2 12C2 6.477 6.477 2 12 2s10 5.477 10 10-4.477 10-10 10z"/>
    </svg>
    Envoyer la réservation via WhatsApp
  </button>

  <!-- SUCCESS -->
  <div class="success-box" id="successbox">
    <i class="ti ti-circle-check" style="font-size:44px; color:#639922;"></i>
    <h3>Réservation envoyée !</h3>
    <p id="successmsg">Nous vous contacterons sous 30 min pour confirmer votre aventure. Merci !</p>
  </div>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:8px; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="https://wa.me/221784876161" target="_blank" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:9px 16px;border-radius:8px;background:#25D366;color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;">
        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#fff"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347z"/><path d="M12 0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12c0 2.127.558 4.126 1.534 5.86L.057 23.269a.5.5 0 0 0 .611.637l5.647-1.479A11.945 11.945 0 0 0 12 24c6.627 0 12-5.373 12-12S18.627 0 12 0zm0 22a9.944 9.944 0 0 1-5.073-1.383l-.363-.216-3.764.986.997-3.672-.236-.376A9.944 9.944 0 0 1 2 12C2 6.477 6.477 2 12 2s10 5.477 10 10-4.477 10-10 10z"/></svg>
        WhatsApp
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://wa.me/221784876161" target="_blank" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:9px 16px;border-radius:8px;background:#1877F2;color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;">
        <i class="ti ti-brand-facebook" style="font-size:16px;"></i> Facebook
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.instagram.com/" target="_blank" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:9px 16px;border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f09433,#e6683c,#dc2743,#cc2366,#bc1888);color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;">
        <i class="ti ti-brand-instagram" style="font-size:16px;"></i> Instagram
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- FOOTER -->
  <div class="re-footer">
    <strong>📞 +221 784 876 161</strong>
    &nbsp;|&nbsp;
    <a href="https://wa.me/221784876161" target="_blank">WhatsApp</a>
    <br>
    <a href="https://www.senegal-raid-evasion.sn" target="_blank">www.senegal-raid-evasion.sn ↗</a>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
  let selectedCirclePrice = 20000;
  let selectedCircleName = 'Tour du Lac — Solo Sensation';
  let selectedPay = 'wave';

  function selectCircuit(el, price, name) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.circuit-item').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));
    el.classList.add('selected');
    el.querySelector('input').checked = true;
    selectedCirclePrice = price;
    selectedCircleName = name;
    calcTotal();
  }

  function selectPay(el, type) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.pay-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));
    el.classList.add('selected');
    selectedPay = type;
    updatePayLink();
  }

  function updatePayLink() {
    const total = calcRawTotal();
    const box = document.getElementById('pay-link-text');
    if (selectedPay === 'wave') {
      box.innerHTML = 'Lien Wave : <a href="https://wave.com/send?phone=221784876161&amount=' + total + '" target="_blank">Payer via Wave ↗</a>';
    } else {
      box.innerHTML = 'Orange Money : composez <strong style="color:#ff6600">#144#</strong> ou <a href="https://www.orange.sn/orangemoney" target="_blank" class="orange-link" style="color:#ff6600; font-weight:700;">Infos Orange Money ↗</a> · N° : +221 78 487 61 61';
    }
  }

  function calcRawTotal() {
    const nb = parseInt(document.getElementById('nbpers').value) || 1;
    const singles = ['Tour du Lac — Solo Sensation', 'Tour du Lac — Duo Évasion'];
    if (singles.includes(selectedCircleName)) return selectedCirclePrice;
    return selectedCirclePrice * nb;
  }

  function calcTotal() {
    const nb = parseInt(document.getElementById('nbpers').value) || 1;
    const total = calcRawTotal();
    document.getElementById('total').textContent = total.toLocaleString('fr-FR') + ' FCFA';
    const singles = ['Tour du Lac — Solo Sensation', 'Tour du Lac — Duo Évasion'];
    if (singles.includes(selectedCircleName)) {
      document.getElementById('recap').textContent = selectedCircleName;
    } else {
      document.getElementById('recap').textContent = selectedCircleName + ' × ' + nb + ' pers';
    }
    updatePayLink();
  }

  function copyLink() {
    const input = document.getElementById('shareLink');
    input.select();
    document.execCommand('copy');
    const btn = document.querySelector('.copy-btn');
    btn.textContent = 'Copié ✓';
    setTimeout(() => btn.textContent = 'Copier', 2000);
  }

  function shareWA(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const link = document.getElementById('shareLink').value;
    const msg = encodeURIComponent('🏍 Réservez votre excursion avec Sénégal Raid Évasion !\n📍 Lac Rose, Dakar\n👉 ' + link + '\n📞 +221 784 876 161');
    window.open('https://wa.me/?text=' + msg, '_blank');
  }

  function submitReservation() {
    const prenom = document.getElementById('prenom').value.trim();
    const nom = document.getElementById('nom').value.trim();
    const tel = document.getElementById('tel').value.trim();
    const email = document.getElementById('email').value.trim();
    const nb = document.getElementById('nbpers').value;
    const date = document.getElementById('datestart').value;
    const heure = document.getElementById('heure').value;
    const notes = document.getElementById('notes').value.trim();
    const total = calcRawTotal();
    const payName = selectedPay === 'wave' ? 'Wave' : 'Orange Money';

    if (!prenom || !nom || !tel) {
      alert('Veuillez remplir au moins votre prénom, nom et téléphone.');
      return;
    }

    const dateStr = date ? new Date(date).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR') : 'À confirmer';

    const waMsg = encodeURIComponent(
      '🏍 *RÉSERVATION — SÉNÉGAL RAID ÉVASION*\n\n' +
      '👤 *Client :* ' + prenom + ' ' + nom + '\n' +
      '📱 *Téléphone :* ' + tel + '\n' +
      (email ? '📧 *Email :* ' + email + '\n' : '') +
      '👥 *Personnes :* ' + nb + '\n' +
      '📅 *Date :* ' + dateStr + ' à ' + heure + '\n\n' +
      '🎯 *Offre :* ' + selectedCircleName + '\n' +
      '💰 *Total :* ' + total.toLocaleString('fr-FR') + ' FCFA\n' +
      '💳 *Paiement :* ' + payName + '\n\n' +
      (notes ? '💬 *Remarques :* ' + notes + '\n\n' : '') +
      '📍 Lac Rose, Dakar, Sénégal'
    );

    window.open('https://wa.me/221784876161?text=' + waMsg, '_blank');

    document.getElementById('successmsg').textContent =
      'Merci ' + prenom + ' ! Votre demande pour « ' + selectedCircleName + ' » (' + total.toLocaleString('fr-FR') + ' FCFA via ' + payName + ') a été envoyée. Nous vous contactons au ' + tel + ' sous 30 min.';
    document.getElementById('successbox').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('successbox').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
  }

  calcTotal();
</script>
</body>
</html>
